zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie於0994年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其傑爾布-可迪維爾沙吉索維勒-維其特時，他的父親Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan21歲，母親Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme30歲。他和Fitzrandolph至少有1個兒子。他去世於1054年在英國越可爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Belfoi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Belluno): probably from an old personal nameBelfiglio meaning ‘beautiful son’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie was born in 0994, in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, was 21 and his mother, Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, was 30. He had at least 1 son with Fitzrandolph. He died in 1054, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie est né en 0994, à Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Fitzrandolph. Il est décédé en 1054, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie 0994 in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan 21 und seine Mutter Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme 30. Er hatte mit Fitzrandolph mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1054 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie è nato il nel 0994 nel Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Fitzrandolph. Morì nel 1054, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillieが0994年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェチェルボウルグ-オクテヴィルサイント-サウベウル-レ-ヴィコムトで生まれた時，父Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinanは21歳，母Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Bellemeは30歳であった。彼はFitzrandolphとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1054年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie(이)가 0994년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 처보우르그-옥테빌 세인트-소브우-레-빅트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Fitzrandolph(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1054년 영국 요르크실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie nasceu em 0994, em Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Fitzrandolph. Ele faleceu em 1054, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie родился в 0994 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-ле-викомт, чирбург-октевилл, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Fitzrandolph. Он умер в 1054 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Richard de Belfoi of Glanvillie nació en 0994, en Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Godehilde de Conde sur Noireau de Belleme, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Fitzrandolph. Murió en 1054, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
